agreement.interpretation: Experts agree with each other 60.6% of the time (1597/2635 pairs). AI agrees with individual experts 58.3% (2188/3751 pairs). AI-expert agreement (58.3%) approaches expert-expert agreement (60.6%), suggesting AI performs comparably to a human reviewer.
